author: SantiMod
content:
The Atlas Brew #23 - 426Live event, deep dive into the product releases is confirmed. Join us this Wednesday at 19:00 UTC!  

The Atlas Brew is a Star Atlas Community Event. Made by the community, for the community   

It happens every Wednesday in the Voice Chat channel   

This week the topic is 426Live and the product releases! Diving deep into each product together with the community!  
 
See you all on Wednesday at 19:00 UTC!

Join 10 minutes earlier to participate in the Quiz! Winner gets one ship!

https://discord.com/events/789226204980707409/1001218131190095923
